rulings.Case Title: LINDA PONCHIONE VS. CONSOLIDATED INSULATION, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 22, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Curtis Wiggins Enterprises, Inc.'s demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued on the court's own motion to January 5, 2016. = (503/TLJ)
